page: Microsoft Azure EC48ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the ECadsv6 server family. Powered by AMD processors, this instance features 48 dedicated vCPUs and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

For local storage requirements, the EC48ads_v6 includes 1843 GB of local disk capacity. The instance is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent storage volumes. It does not include any integrated GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the high memory-to-vCPU ratio and substantial local storage capacity make this instance class highly cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads. The combination of 384.0 GB of RAM and fast local storage is well-suited for relational databases, in-memory caching layers, data analytics, and enterprise applications requiring high memory capacity without the need for dedicated GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure EC48ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECadsv6 family, powered by AMD processors on the x86_64 architecture. Managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides 48 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB per core ratio. It features 1843 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage for high-performance disk configurations. Lacking integrated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses, the instance is engineered for resource-dense workloads. The balance of high memory capacity and substantial local storage makes it highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise applications, relational databases, and large-scale data processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC48ads_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and 1843 GB of local storage for demanding database and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD processors, high memory density, and substantial local storage for enterprise workloads.
